title: Ship Inn Restoration Complete on Piel Island
excerpt: Leck Construction has successfully completed the restoration of the Grade II listed Ship Inn on Piel Island — one of Cumbria's most distinctive heritage landmarks. Work included structural masonry repairs, lime pointing and full internal refurbishment.

children.text: Leck Construction has successfully completed the restoration of the Grade II listed Ship Inn on Piel Island — one of Cumbria's most distinctive heritage landmarks. Work included structural masonry repairs, lime pointing and full internal refurbishment.

title: New NHS Healthcare Contract Awarded in Ulverston
excerpt: We are proud to announce the award of a new contract to deliver a primary care facility in Ulverston for NHS Cumbria. The scheme will provide expanded GP services to over 12,000 patients across the Furness Peninsula.

children.text: We are proud to announce the award of a new contract to deliver a primary care facility in Ulverston for NHS Cumbria. The scheme will provide expanded GP services to over 12,000 patients across the Furness Peninsula.

title: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Certification Successfully Renewed
excerpt: Following an independent audit by NQA, Leck Construction has renewed its ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management certification — reinforcing our commitment to reducing environmental impact across all operations and project sites.

children.text: Following an independent audit by NQA, Leck Construction has renewed its ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management certification — reinforcing our commitment to reducing environmental impact across all operations and project sites.

title: Wings Nightclub Refurbishment Completed on Programme
excerpt: Our commercial team completed a full internal refurbishment of the Wings venue in Barrow-in-Furness, delivering the project on time and within budget ahead of the client's planned reopening date.

children.text: Our commercial team completed a full internal refurbishment of the Wings venue in Barrow-in-Furness, delivering the project on time and within budget ahead of the client's planned reopening date.

title: Major Industrial Contract Secured at Lillyhall Business Park
excerpt: Leck Construction has been appointed as principal contractor for a new portal frame industrial unit at Lillyhall Business Park in West Cumbria, adding to our growing portfolio of industrial and civil engineering projects across the region.

children.text: Leck Construction has been appointed as principal contractor for a new portal frame industrial unit at Lillyhall Business Park in West Cumbria, adding to our growing portfolio of industrial and civil engineering projects across the region.

title: Affordable Housing Scheme Handed Over to Cumbria County Council
excerpt: We are pleased to have handed over a 14-unit affordable housing scheme in Barrow-in-Furness to Cumbria County Council, delivering high-quality homes for local families as part of our ongoing social housing programme.

children.text: We are pleased to have handed over a 14-unit affordable housing scheme in Barrow-in-Furness to Cumbria County Council, delivering high-quality homes for local families as part of our ongoing social housing programme.

title: BAE Systems Measured Term Contract Renewed for Further Three Years
excerpt: We are delighted to announce that our long-standing measured term contract with BAE Systems has been renewed for a further three-year term — a testament to the quality of our work and the strength of a relationship built over nearly two decades.

children.text: We are delighted to announce that our long-standing measured term contract with BAE Systems has been renewed for a further three-year term — a testament to the quality of our work and the strength of a relationship built over nearly two decades.
